compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add merge-aware filtering to pre-commit-test-gate.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description
Insert merge-filtering block into pre-commit-test-gate.sh after line 119 (after all-allowlisted early exit) and before the test-dirs config block. Mirror the exact pattern from pre-commit-review-gate.sh lines 193-224:

1. Detect MERGE_HEAD existence
2. Read MERGE_HEAD SHA, compute merge-base between HEAD and MERGE_HEAD
3. Guard: MERGE_HEAD must resolve to a real commit different from HEAD
4. Get files changed on worktree branch: git diff --name-only merge-base..HEAD
5. Filter STAGED_FILES to only include files the worktree branch touched
6. If filtered list is empty, exit 0
7. Fail-safe: if merge-base computation fails, fall through to normal enforcement

Add inline comment block documenting the algorithm (matching review gate comment style).

## TDD Requirement
Task 1 RED tests must turn GREEN after this implementation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass including new merge-aware tests
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh 2>&1 | tail -1 | grep FAILED:.0
- [ ] MERGE_HEAD detection block present in hook
  Verify: grep -q MERGE_HEAD plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-gate.sh
- [ ] Inline comment documents the merge-filtering algorithm
  Verify: grep -q 'Merge commit: filter out incoming-only files' plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-gate.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none required — RED tests already exist) ✓
